title: Opening for Software Engineer at Apollo Telehealth Capital India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Apollo Telehealth Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Apollo Telehealth Capital India family as a Software Engineer in Madurai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Apollo Telehealth Capital India:
Apollo Telehealth Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Telehealth Capital India!
